capture_note: Captured from the packaged Next.js dashboard served by agent-bom serve with bundled demo data pushed through /v1/results/push. Graph screenshots are real product routes in capture mode; README/Docker proof uses one focused graph capture rather than duplicate dark/light theme copies.

screenshots.scope: Risk overview top frame with headline KPIs, posture grade, and start of attack paths
Risk overview mid-frame with attack paths and exposure KPIs
Focused agent mesh graph across selected agents, MCP servers, packages, tools, credentials, and findings
Fix-first attack path queue with snapshot pressure, graph evidence export, and remediation handoff
